page_content: Course Title Credits Required Courses ANSC327 Molecular and Quantitative Animal Genetics or ANSC450 Animal Breeding Plans ANSC446 Physiology of Mammalian Reproduction & ANSC447 and Physiology of Mammalian Reproduction Laboratory AREC306 Farm Management and Sustainable Food Production or ANSC270 Animal Enterprise Management or INAG204 Agricultural Business Management CHEM231 Organic Chemistry I or PLSC275 or AGST275 Fundamentals of Agricultural and Environmental Chemistry ANSC359 Internship Experience in Animal and Avian Sciences Advanced ANSC Electives Select 9 credits of the following: ANSC330 Equine Science ANSC340 Health Management of Animal Populations ANSC410 The Gut Microbiome and its Roles in Health and Disease ANSC417 Regulatory Issues in Animal Care and Management ANSC435 Experimental Embryology ANSC437 Animal Biotechnology ANSC440 Zoonotic Diseases and Control ANSC443 Physiology of Lactation ANSC444 Domestic Animal Endocrinology ANSC450 Animal Breeding Plans
